feed.title: Daniel Roy Greenfeld
feed.subtitle: Inside the head of Daniel Roy Greenfeld
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2024, Daniel Roy Greenfeld

entry.title: TIL: Forcing pip to use virtualenv
entry.summary: Necessary because installing things into your base python causes false positives, true negatives, and other head bangers.
entry.content:
Necessary because installing things into your base python causes false positives, true negatives, and other head bangers.

Set this environment variable, preferably in your rc file:

# ~/.zshrc 
export PIP_REQUIRE_VIRTUALENV=true

Now if I try to use pip outside a virtualenv:

dj-notebook on  main [$] is 📦 v0.6.1 via 🐍 v3.10.6 
❯ pip install ruff 
ERROR: Could not find an activated virtualenv (required).

This TIL is thanks to David Winterbottom.
